messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a python-pptx script that builds a 12-slide corporate presentation for Private Equity Firms outlining our EdTech Scale-Up Plan. Use structured growth charts and market analysis tables. Output the file as "EdTech_Scale.pptx". All content must be written in English using a 4:3 Standard layout. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "EdTech_Scale.pptx"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

CARD_GAP = Inches(0.2)
ROW_GAP = Inches(0.15)

COLOR_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)       # Navy
COLOR_ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xA8, 0x96)          # Teal
COLOR_LIGHT_BG = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)        # Light gray
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)       # Dark text
COLOR_MUTED_GRAY = RGBColor(0x7F, 0x8C, 0x8D)      # Muted gray
COLOR_GOLD = RGBColor(0xD4, 0xAF, 0x37)            # Gold accent
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_TABLE_HEADER = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)
COLOR_TABLE_ALT_ROW = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body=None, bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_ACCENT):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    line = shape.line
    line.color.rgb = border_color
    line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7),
                     body, font_size=11, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, x, y):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ACCENT
    shape.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.5),
                 label_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "EdTech Scale-Up Plan  |  Confidential", font_size=9, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BG
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_GRAY
        line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + (height - Inches(0.4)) / 2, width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4),
                     "Image Placeholder", font_size=11, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_chart(slide, chart_type, left, top, width, height, category_data, series_names, values_2d):
    data = CategoryChartData()
    data.categories = category_data

    for i, series_name in enumerate(series_names):
        data.add_series(series_name, values=values_2d[i])

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, left, top, width, height, data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(9)

    return chart_frame


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7), Inches(1.2),
                 "EdTech Scale-Up Plan", font_size=38, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.6),
                 "Strategic Growth Framework for Private Equity Partners", font_size=20, color=COLOR_ACCENT)

    # Decorative accent bar
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.4), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "Confidential  |  Prepared for Investment Committee Review", font_size=12, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY)
    add_footer(slide, 1, 12)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Executive Summary", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    # Three summary cards
    card_w = (Inches(10) - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT - 2 * CARD_GAP) / 3
    for i in range(3):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.2), card_w, Inches(1.8),
                 title=["Market Opportunity", "Growth Strategy", "Investment Return"][i],
                 body=[
                     "$47B TAM in K-12 EdTech with 18% CAGR through 2030",
                     "Platform-led expansion across 3 verticals and 5 geographies",
                     "Target IRR of 28%+ over 5-year hold period"
                 ][i])

    # Key metrics strip
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Key Metrics at a Glance", font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    metrics = [
        ("ARR", "$24M"), ("Gross Margin", "78%"), ("NRR", "135%"),
        ("CAC Payback", "14 mo"), ("EBITDA", "12%")
    ]
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * Inches(1.8)
        add_text_box(slide, x, Inches(3.9), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_size=10, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x, Inches(4.25), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.5),
                     value, font_size=22, bold=True, color=COLOR_ACCENT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Body text
    body = ("Our EdTech platform has achieved product-market fit across K-12 and higher education segments with a proven unit economics model. With PE backing, we project 3x revenue growth over the next 5 years through vertical expansion, international markets, and strategic acquisitions.")
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.2),
                 body, font_size=12, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 12)


def slide_03_market_opportunity(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Market Opportunity Analysis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Market Opportunity Analysis", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    # Left callout card
    add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.2), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.0),
             title="Total Addressable Market", body="$47 Billion\nProjected by 2030")

    # Right bullet list
    bullets = [
        "K-12 EdTech market growing at 18% CAGR driven by digital transformation mandates",
        "Higher education spending on technology increased 22% YoY post-pandemic",
        "Enterprise learning & development segment reaching $35B globally",
        "AI-powered personalization creating new premium pricing tiers (30-40% uplift)",
        "Regulatory tailwinds: ESSA funding, state-level edtech adoption mandates"
    ]
    y = Inches(1.2)
    for bullet in bullets:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(5.0), y, Inches(4.5), Inches(0.5),
                     "•  " + bullet, font_size=11, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT)
        y += Inches(0.52)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 12)


def slide_04_growth_strategy(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Growth Strategy Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Growth Strategy Overview", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    strategies = [
        ("Vertical Expansion", "Enter Higher Ed & Corporate L&D segments with tailored product offerings"),
        ("Geographic Scale", "Launch in 3 new international markets (UK, APAC, LATAM) within 18 months"),
        ("Platform Ecosystem", "Build open API marketplace enabling third-party integrations and app ecosystem")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.9)
    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(strategies):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.2), card_w, Inches(3.5), title=title_text, body=body_text)

    # Bottom summary line
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.0),
                 "Combined strategy targets 3x revenue growth and expansion into adjacent markets with proven unit economics.",
                 font_size=12, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 12)


def slide_05_revenue_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Revenue Projections (2024-2028)"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Revenue Projections (2024-2028)", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    categories = ["FY 2024", "FY 2025", "FY 2026", "FY 2027", "FY 2028"]
    series_names = ["Core Platform Revenue ($M)", "New Verticals Revenue ($M)"]
    values_2d = [
        [18.5, 24.0, 32.0, 42.0, 56.0],
        [5.5, 10.0, 18.0, 28.0, 40.0]
    ]

    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2),
              Inches(8.4), Inches(3.5), categories, series_names, values_2d)

    # Insight callout
    add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.0),
             title="Revenue Growth Trajectory", body="Projected CAGR of 34% over the 5-year period driven by platform expansion and new vertical adoption.")

    add_footer(slide, 5, 12)


def slide_06_customer_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Customer Acquisition Metrics"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Customer Acquisition Metrics", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    # Line chart - CAC trend
    categories = ["Q1 24", "Q2 24", "Q3 24", "Q4 24", "Q1 25", "Q2 25"]
    series_names = ["CAC ($)", "LTV ($)", "LTV:CAC Ratio"]
    values_2d = [
        [850, 780, 720, 690, 650, 610],
        [4200, 4500, 4800, 5100, 5400, 5800],
        [4.9, 5.8, 6.7, 7.4, 8.3, 9.5]
    ]

    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2),
              Inches(5.5), Inches(3.0), categories, series_names, values_2d)

    # Donut chart - Channel mix
    categories = ["Organic", "Paid Search", "Partnerships", "Referrals"]
    series_names = ["Channel Mix (%)"]
    values_2d = [[45, 28, 17, 10]]

    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.2),
              Inches(3.2), Inches(3.0), categories, series_names, values_2d)

    # Bottom metrics cards
    card_w = (Inches(8.5) - 2 * CARD_GAP) / 4
    for i in range(4):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(4.6), card_w, Inches(1.0),
                 title=["NRR", "Churn Rate", "Net Revenue Retention", "Expansion Revenue"][i],
                 body=["135%", "<2.5% MoM", "High", "+38% YoY"][i])

    add_footer(slide, 6, 12)


def slide_07_competitive_landscape(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Competitive Landscape"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Competitive Landscape", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    # Build table manually using shapes for precise control
    headers = ["Competitor", "Market Share", "Key Strengths", "Key Weaknesses"]
    rows_data = [
        ["Our Platform", "12%", "AI-driven personalization, strong NRR", "Brand recognition vs incumbents"],
        ["Competitor A", "28%", "Established brand, large sales team", "Legacy tech stack, slow innovation"],
        ["Competitor B", "15%", "Strong K-12 presence, government contracts", "Limited higher ed offerings"],
        ["Competitor C", "9%", "Innovative AI features, VC-backed", "High burn rate, unproven unit economics"],
        ["Competitor D", "7%", "Enterprise partnerships, global reach", "Complex pricing, poor UX"]
    ]

    table_left = Inches(0.8)
    table_top = Inches(1.2)
    col_widths = [Inches(2.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(3.0), Inches(2.7)]
    row_height = Inches(0.5)

    # Header row
    x = table_left
    for j, header in enumerate(headers):
        add_text_box(slide, x, table_top, col_widths[j], row_height,
                     header, font_size=11, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        # Background rectangle behind text
        bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, table_top, col_widths[j], row_height)
        bg.fill.solid()
        bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TABLE_HEADER
        bg.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        bg.line.width = Pt(0.5)
        # Move text above background by adding shape first then text on top
        x += col_widths[j]

    # Data rows
    for i, row in enumerate(rows_data):
        y = table_top + (i + 1) * row_height
        bg_color = COLOR_TABLE_ALT_ROW if i % 2 == 0 else COLOR_WHITE
        x = table_left
        for j, cell_text in enumerate(row):
            add_text_box(slide, x, y, col_widths[j], row_height,
                         cell_text, font_size=10, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
            bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, col_widths[j], row_height)
            bg.fill.solid()
            bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
            bg.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD)
            bg.line.width = Pt(0.5)
            x += col_widths[j]

    add_footer(slide, 7, 12)


def slide_08_platform_architecture(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Technology Platform Architecture"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Technology Platform Architecture", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    tiers = [
        ("Frontend Layer", ["Web App (React)", "Mobile Apps (iOS/Android)", "LMS Integrations"]),
        ("Application Services", ["API Gateway", "Auth & Identity", "Analytics Engine", "Content Delivery"]),
        ("Data & Infrastructure", ["PostgreSQL Cluster", "Redis Cache", "AWS Cloud Native", "ML Model Serving"])
    ]

    tier_colors = [COLOR_PRIMARY, COLOR_ACCENT, RGBColor(0x27, 0xAE, 0x60)]
    card_w = Inches(8.4)
    y_start = Inches(1.3)

    for i, (tier_title, items) in enumerate(tiers):
        y = y_start + i * Inches(1.5)
        # Tier label
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(2), Inches(0.4),
                     tier_title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=tier_colors[i])

        # Cards for each item in the tier
        item_w = (card_w - 2 * CARD_GAP) / len(items)
        x_start = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(2.5)
        for j, item in enumerate(items):
            add_card(slide, x_start + j * (item_w + CARD_GAP), y + Inches(0.1),
                     item_w, Inches(0.8), body=item, border_color=tier_colors[i])

    # Connecting lines between tiers
    for i in range(len(tiers) - 1):
        y_line = y_start + (i + 1) * Inches(1.5) - Inches(0.1)
        line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.DOWN_ARROW, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(2), y_line, Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4))
        line_shape.fill.solid()
        line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_GRAY
        line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 8, 12)


def slide_09_financial_highlights(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Financial Highlights & KPIs"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Financial Highlights & KPIs", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    kpis = [
        ("ARR", "$24M", "+67% YoY"),
        ("Gross Margin", "78%", "Industry-leading"),
        ("Net Revenue Retention", "135%", "Best-in-class"),
        ("CAC Payback Period", "14 months", "< 18 mo target")
    ]

    card_w = (Inches(9.0) - 3 * CARD_GAP) / 4
    for i, (label, value, subtext) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.2), card_w, Inches(2.0), title=label, body=f"{value}\n{subtext}")

    # Bar chart - Monthly recurring revenue trend
    categories = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun"]
    series_names = ["MRR ($K)"]
    values_2d = [[1850, 1920, 2010, 2100, 2180, 2260]]

    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.7),
              Inches(4.2), Inches(2.5), categories, series_names, values_2d)

    # Bar chart - Customer count growth
    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_names = ["New Customers"]
    values_2d = [[120, 185, 260, 340]]

    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(5.0), Inches(3.7),
              Inches(4.2), Inches(2.5), categories, series_names, values_2d)

    add_footer(slide, 9, 12)


def slide_10_investment_thesis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Investment Thesis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Investment Thesis", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    # Left column - thesis points
    thesis_points = [
        ("1. Market Leadership Position", "Established platform with 12% market share and strong brand recognition in K-12 segment"),
        ("2. Proven Unit Economics", "LTV:CAC ratio of 9.5x demonstrates scalable growth model with clear path to profitability"),
        ("3. Platform Moat", "Proprietary AI engine and network effects create defensible competitive advantages"),
        ("4. Multiple Growth Vectors", "Three distinct expansion paths: vertical, geographic, and ecosystem-driven")
    ]

    y = Inches(1.2)
    for title_text, body_text in thesis_points:
        add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(5.0), Inches(1.3), title=title_text, body=body_text)
        y += Inches(1.45)

    # Right column - ROI table
    roi_headers = ["Metric", "Current", "Target (Yr 5)", "Delta"]
    roi_data = [
        ["Revenue ($M)", "$24", "$160", "+567%"],
        ["EBITDA Margin", "12%", "35%", "+23pp"],
        ["Customer Count", "8,500", "45,000", "+429%"],
        ["Enterprise Value ($M)", "$180", "$1.2B", "+567%"]
    ]

    table_left = Inches(6.0)
    table_top = Inches(1.2)
    col_widths = [Inches(2.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(1.4), Inches(1.0)]
    row_height = Inches(0.5)

    # Header
    x = table_left
    for j, header in enumerate(roi_headers):
        bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, table_top, col_widths[j], row_height)
        bg.fill.solid()
        bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TABLE_HEADER
        bg.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        bg.line.width = Pt(0.5)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), table_top, col_widths[j] - Inches(0.2), row_height,
                     header, font_size=10, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        x += col_widths[j]

    # Data rows
    for i, row in enumerate(roi_data):
        y = table_top + (i + 1) * row_height
        bg_color = COLOR_TABLE_ALT_ROW if i % 2 == 0 else COLOR_WHITE
        x = table_left
        for j, cell_text in enumerate(row):
            add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), y, col_widths[j] - Inches(0.2), row_height,
                         cell_text, font_size=10, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
            bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, col_widths[j], row_height)
            bg.fill.solid()
            bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
            bg.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD)
            bg.line.width = Pt(0.5)
            x += col_widths[j]

    add_footer(slide, 10, 12)


def slide_11_roadmap(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Implementation Roadmap"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Implementation Roadmap", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    phases = [
        ("Phase 1: Foundation\nQ1-Q2 2025", ["Platform hardening", "Security audit & SOC2", "Core team expansion"]),
        ("Phase 2: Expansion\nQ3-Q4 2025", ["Higher Ed launch", "UK market entry", "API marketplace v1"]),
        ("Phase 3: Scale\nQ1-Q2 2026", ["APAC operations", "Enterprise tier release", "AI engine v2"]),
        ("Phase 4: Maturity\nQ3-Q4 2026", ["LATAM expansion", "Strategic acquisitions", "IPO preparation"])
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.1)
    for i, (title_text, items) in enumerate(phases):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        y = Inches(1.3)

        # Phase header box
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(0.9), title=title_text.replace("\n", " "), border_color=COLOR_ACCENT)

        # Items below
        for j, item in enumerate(items):
            add_card(slide, x, y + Inches(1.1) + j * Inches(0.75), card_w, Inches(0.65), body=item, border_color=RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD))

        # Arrow connector between phases
        if i < len(phases) - 1:
            arrow_x = x + card_w + Inches(0.02)
            arrow_y = y + Inches(0.45)
            arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, arrow_x, arrow_y, Inches(0.3), Inches(0.2))
            arrow.fill.solid()
            arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ACCENT
            arrow.line.fill.background()

    # Bottom summary
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.8), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.0),
                 "Total investment required: $45M over 24 months | Projected revenue at Phase 4 completion: $160M ARR",
                 font_size=12, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 11, 12)


def slide_12_thank_you(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    # Decorative top bar
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), Inches(10), Inches(0.08))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(2.5), Inches(6), Inches(1.0),
                 "Thank You", font_size=42, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(3.7), Inches(6), Inches(0.6),
                 "We look forward to discussing this opportunity with you.", font_size=18, color=COLOR_ACCENT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Accent bar below thank you
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4), Inches(4.5), Inches(2), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    bar.line.fill.background()

    # Contact info cards
    contacts = [
        ("Investor Relations", "ir@edtechscale.com"),
        ("CEO", "ceo@edtechscale.com"),
        ("Phone", "+1 (555) 012-3456")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.7)
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(contacts):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.0), card_w, Inches(1.0), title=label, body=value, border_color=COLOR_ACCENT)

    # Logo placeholder
    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/logo.png", Inches(4.3), Inches(6.2), Inches(1.4), Inches(0.8))

    add_footer(slide, 12, 12)


# ── Main Entry Point ────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_market_opportunity(prs)
    slide_04_growth_strategy(prs)
    slide_05_revenue_projections(prs)
    slide_06_customer_metrics(prs)
    slide_07_competitive_landscape(prs)
    slide_08_platform_architecture(prs)
    slide_09_financial_highlights(prs)
    slide_10_investment_thesis(prs)
    slide_11_roadmap(prs)
    slide_12_thank_you(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
